summary: Summary: Speaker2 arrived experiencing initial frustration and happiness, then surprise when told they had the incorrect form; they complained about waiting 45 minutes and experienced escalating frustration and anger while trying to obtain a California I.D. Speaker1 remained neutral and polite at first, explaining the different out-of-state and replacement forms and offering guidance. As Speaker2’s frustration and anger intensified and they refused to leave, Speaker1 moved from neutral to frustration and then to anger, threatened to call security unless the correct form was completed, and finally directed Speaker2 to stand in another line. The encounter ended with Speaker2 exiting in anger and Speaker1 restoring order.
